Bash(git commit -m "Add media posters and interactive channel resizing

Features added:
- Plex poster integration for media bars and tooltips
- Channel height scaling with settings slider (50%-200%)
- Interactive drag-to-resize handles on channel items
- Poster aspect ratio preservation during scaling

Media Posters:
- Display Plex artwork on left side of media bars
- Show posters in hover tooltips with media info
- Smart poster source detection (thumb, art, parentThumb, grandparentThumb)
- Toggle setting in Interface Settings panel
- Proper aspect ratio maintenance when scaling

Interactive Channel Resizing:
- Visual resize handles at bottom of each channel item
- Drag up/down to adjust channel height in real-time
- Synchronized scaling of channels, program bars, and posters
- Real-time settings panel synchronization
- Auto-save on resize completion
- Enhanced visual feedback with glowing effects

Technical improvements:
- Proper event handling with drag state management
- Aspect ratio calculations for poster scaling
- Performance optimized with proper cleanup functions
- Responsive design maintained across all scale sizes

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git commit -m "Implement Plex categories and collections support

Features added:
- Full categories discovery via Plex hubs API (/hubs)
- Collections discovery across all libraries (/library/sections/{key}/collections)
- Channel loading support for both categories and collections
- TV show expansion in collections (episodes from shows)
- Progress tracking during category/collection loading

Categories (Plex Hubs):
- Discovers trending, recently added, and recommendation hubs
- Loads actual hub content via /hubs/{key} endpoint
- Limited to 20 items per category for performance
- Clear labeling as (Category) in channel names

Collections:
- Discovers user-created collections from all libraries
- Loads collection items via /library/collections/{key}/items
- Supports TV show expansion to individual episodes
- Shows source library context in channel names
- Limited to 30 items per collection for performance

Technical improvements:
- Proper error handling for missing hubs/collections
- Console logging for discovery debugging
- Integration with existing progress tracking system
- Maintains consistent channel structure with other content types

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add randomize button to randomize channel content

Features added:
- New ⚡ Randomize button next to Shuffle button in header
- Randomizes the order of media content within each channel
- Uses Fisher-Yates shuffle algorithm for proper randomization
- Clears program schedule cache to ensure fresh content order
- Re-renders EPG grid with randomized content
- Shows progress feedback and success notification
- Maintains existing channel structure while shuffling content

Button styling:
- Matches existing button design with consistent hover states
- Uses text symbol (⚡) to match other header buttons
- Positioned between Shuffle and Settings buttons

Technical implementation:
- Event listener attached to randomizeBtn
- Shuffles content array for each channel independently
- Preserves channel metadata while randomizing media order
- Integrates with existing notification and progress systems

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix randomize button icon and functionality

Icon changes:
- Change randomize icon from ⚡ to ⇌ to match text symbol style
- Now consistent with other header buttons (⇄, ⇌, ⚙, ?)

Functionality fixes:
- Fix randomize not changing content due to deterministic shuffle override
- Add randomSeed property to channels that increments on randomization
- Modify _generateStableSchedule to include randomSeed in hash calculation
- Each randomize click now produces genuinely different content order
- Maintains stable broadcast schedule while allowing randomization
- Enhanced console logging for debugging randomization process

Technical details:
- randomSeed breaks deterministic pattern without affecting other functionality
- Program schedule cache properly cleared to force regeneration
- Seed string format: channelId:randomSeed (e.g. "library_1:3")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix group header positioning in drag-and-drop

Problem fixed:
- Group headers sometimes appeared at bottom of channel lists after drag-and-drop
- Drop logic was inserting items before the header instead of after

Solution:
- Rewritten drop logic to ensure headers always position before their channels
- Header is inserted first at target position
- Channel items are then inserted immediately after the header
- Maintains proper group structure: Header → Channels → Next Group

Technical changes:
- Fixed insertBefore logic in both drop directions (above/below)
- Added proper insertion point tracking for channel items
- Ensures consistent header-first ordering regardless of drop position

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Add right-click context menu for channel removal

Features added:
- Right-click context menu on sidebar channels
- Remove option to disable channels from settings
- Professional context menu styling with blur backdrop
- Smart positioning to stay within viewport bounds
- Keyboard and click-outside dismissal

Context menu functionality:
- Right-click any channel in the sidebar to open menu
- "Remove Channel" option with trash can icon
- Automatically removes channel from appropriate settings category
- Updates visible channels configuration and saves settings
- Immediately reloads channels and EPG without the removed channel
- Shows success notification when channel is removed

Technical implementation:
- Context menu HTML structure with semantic markup
- CSS styling matching app theme with backdrop blur
- Event delegation for menu item clicks
- Smart viewport positioning with overflow detection
- Proper cleanup of event listeners
- Integration with existing settings save system

- Immediate visual feedback
- Clean menu appearance with hover states
- Keyboard accessibility (Escape to close)
